name: supabase
description: Repo-local Supabase MCP plugin for database, docs, and development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Use Supabase MCP tools in this repo.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Supabase MCP plugin configured for safer project-scoped, read-only development and documentation workflows.
defaultPrompt: List my Supabase tables using MCP.
Generate TypeScript types from my schema.
Search Supabase docs for RLS guidance.
